title: MIMIC-IV and eICU PhysioNet Clinical EHR Resources

data_urls.access_notes: Credentialed PhysioNet access and a data use agreement are required.

data_urls.description: eICU Collaborative Research Database PhysioNet page
data_urls.access_notes: Credentialed PhysioNet access and a data use agreement are required.

instructions: Do not download or expose data unless the user has valid PhysioNet credentialed access and has signed the required data use agreement.
Use official PhysioNet project pages and MIT-LCP code repositories to construct permitted tasks.
Record cohort definition, time window, outcome definition, table versions, and site/unit availability.

scale.download_size: large controlled-access relational datasets; not suitable for automatic public pulls

recommended_axes.name: site_and_unit_similarity
recommended_axes.definition: Hospital, ICU unit, or care-setting support when available and permitted by the dataset schema.

recommended_axes.name: temporal_similarity
recommended_axes.definition: Admission time, care-era, or deployment-time distance from training data.

recommended_axes.name: phenotype_and_care_pathway_similarity
recommended_axes.definition: Diagnosis, procedure, medication, and trajectory similarity for patient cohorts.

useful_for: Clinical deployment generalization audits when credentialed access exists.
Testing site, time, phenotype, and care-process shifts.
Connecting SPECTRA to clinical external validation questions.
leakage_risks: Patient identifiers and repeated admissions must not cross splits.
Outcome windows can leak future information through post-outcome measurements.
Credentialed health data must not be sent to external APIs or shared outside the permitted environment.
